name: Backend Platform
description: Core backend services: api-gateway, worker-dispatcher, event-router, auth-service

name: Data Infrastructure
description: Data pipelines, log streaming (logstream project), and analytics infra

name: Platform Engineering
description: Kubernetes infra, CI/CD, GitOps, observability, and developer experience

name: Security
description: Security reviews, pen testing, secrets management, and compliance

name: Developer Experience
description: CLI tooling, SDKs, docs site, and onboarding experience for NanoQueue users

name: Quality Assurance
description: End-to-end test coverage, load testing, and release readiness for all services

name: Cloud Cost Optimization
description: Spot node strategy, right-sizing, reserved instance planning, and cost alerting

name: Release Management
description: Coordinating release trains, changelogs, hotfix processes, and rollback runbooks

name: Integrations
description: Third-party integrations: Slack webhooks, Datadog, PagerDuty, and customer connector library

name: Growth Engineering
description: Self-serve sign-up flow, usage dashboards, trial conversion, and billing integrations

name: Documentation
description: Developer docs site, API reference, changelog, and migration guides

name: SDK and Client Libraries
description: Official Go, Python, TypeScript, and Java client libraries for NanoQueue

name: Support Engineering
description: Handles escalated customer issues, reproduces reported bugs, and owns support tooling

name: Mobile Clients
description: Planned iOS and Android companion apps for NanoQueue queue management dashboards

name: Patient Portal UX
description: UX team building and reviewing the Cumberland patient portal redesign

name: ML and Intelligent Routing
description: Research team exploring ML-based message priority scoring and intelligent queue routing

name: Compliance and Privacy
description: SOC 2 Type II preparation, GDPR data residency, and audit logging requirements

name: Open Source Community
description: GitHub issues triage, contributor onboarding, hackathon organization, and community Discord

name: Performance Engineering
description: Continuous benchmarking, flame graph analysis, and latency SLO ownership across all services

name: Design Systems
description: Component library, Figma tokens, accessibility standards, and visual consistency across all NanoQueue surfaces
